cards.back: A type of requirement modeling that focuses on the flow of interactions between stakeholders, users, and systems.
A visual representation of the steps a user takes to complete a task or achieve a goal, used in flow-oriented modeling.
A type of flow-oriented model that uses separate lanes or swimlanes to represent different stakeholders or roles involved in a process.
A visual representation of an organization's processes and activities, used to identify and document requirements in flow-oriented modeling.
A type of flow-oriented model that shows the interactions between stakeholders, users, and systems, used to identify and document functional requirements.
